# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '5'))
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_TYPE', description: 'Select the type of build (e.g. debug, release)')
        choice(name: 'TESTING_TYPE', choices: ['unit test', 'integration test', 'both'], description: 'Select testing type')
        choice(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TYPE', choices: ['local', 'prod'], description: 'Select deployment environment')
        booleanParam(name: 'RUN_CUSTOM_COMMANDS', description: 'Run custom commands?')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                if (params.RUN_CUSTOM_COMMANDS) {
                    sh "echo 'Building...'"
                }
                sh "npm install"
                sh "mvn clean package"
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                if (params.TESTING_TYPE == 'unit test') {
                    sh "jest"
                } else if (params.TESTING_TYPE == 'integration test') {
                    sh "mvn integration-test"
                } else if (params.TESTING_TYPE == 'both') {
                    sh "jest && mvn integration-test"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                if (params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE == 'local') {
                    sh "cp target/your-artifact.jar /path/to/local/deployment/"
                } else if (params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE == 'prod') {
                    sh "aws s3 cp target/your-artifact.jar s3://your-bucket-name/your-artifact.jar"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Run Custom Commands') {
            steps {
                if (params.RUN_CUSTOM_COMMANDS) {
                    script {
                        def customCommands = env.BUILD_TYPE
                        sh "echo '${customCommands}' | while IFS= read -r line; do ${line}; done"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            archiveArtifacts 'target/*.jar'
            emailext subject: 'Build Result', body: "${BUILD_URL}"
        }
    }
}
